hero.title: Protecting Your Brand Starts Here
hero.subtitle: Specialized legal services in Intellectual Property, Commercial Contracts, and Regulatory Advisory across Saudi Arabia & the GCC

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Our Legal Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive legal solutions designed for your business needs
services.s1_desc: Complete trademark registration, search, opposition handling, and brand protection across Saudi Arabia, GCC, and international markets.
services.s2_desc: Comprehensive intellectual property portfolio management, monitoring, and enforcement strategies.
services.s3_desc: Copyright registration, protection, and enforcement for creative works, software, and digital content.
services.s4_desc: Trade name registration, protection, and dispute resolution for businesses in Saudi Arabia.
services.s5_desc: Industrial design registration, protection strategies, and infringement defense across GCC markets.
services.s6_desc: Trademark oppositions, IP disputes, commercial dispute strategy, and pre-litigation advisory.
services.s7_desc: Expert one-on-one legal advisory sessions for any IP or commercial law matter.

why.label: Our Advantage
why.title: Why Choose Us
why.subtitle: We deliver results, not just advice
why.r1_desc: Former government and regulatory professionals with deep IP expertise.
why.r2_desc: Extensive experience with Saudi IP Authority processes and commercial disputes.
why.r3_desc: From registration to litigation, we handle every aspect of IP protection.
why.r4_desc: Your business information and legal matters are protected with the highest security.

pricing.label: Transparent Pricing
pricing.title: Our Packages & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Clear, competitive pricing for all our legal services

about.label: About Our Firm
about.title: Legal Excellence Meets Business Insight
about.description: We are a specialized legal practice focused on intellectual property, commercial contracts, and regulatory advisory. With former public sector experience and deep familiarity with the Saudi Authority for Intellectual Property, we deliver practical, execution-driven solutions.
about.f1: Former public sector and regulatory experience
about.f2: Deep familiarity with Saudi IP Authority processes
about.f4: Bilingual team serving Arabic and English clients

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.step1_desc: We assess your needs, analyze your situation, and outline the best strategy for protection.
approach.step2_desc: We create a tailored legal plan with clear timelines, deliverables, and transparent pricing.
approach.step3_desc: Our team handles all filings, communications with authorities, and legal documentation.
approach.step4_desc: We monitor your IP portfolio, handle renewals, and respond to any threats or infringements.

emergency.title: Need Urgent IP Protection?
emergency.desc: For time-sensitive matters, we provide rapid-response support including immediate filings, urgent objection handling, and fast legal positioning.

contact.subtitle: Ready to protect your brand? Our team is here to help.
